title: Wraith Squadron: The Dirty Dozen of Star Wars
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|title=Wraith Squadron: The Dirty Dozen of ''Star Wars''}}
{{MagazineArticle
|image=[[File:Wraith_Squadron_SWG9.jpg]]
|title="Wraith Squadron: The Dirty Dozen of ''Star Wars''"
|author=[[Josh Radke|Joshua J. Radke]]
|illustrator=[[Joe Corroney]]
|editor=
|publisher=
|release date=[[March 12]], [[2002]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020222.html|text=Starfighters Soar in Gamer #9}} indicates that [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] shipped to subscribers on [[February 22]], [[2002]], and both issues 8 and 10 were sent to newstands 18 days after their subscriber ship date; thus, ''Star Wars Gamer'' 9 was published on [[March 12]].</ref>
|pages=
|published in=[[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]
|reprinted in=
}}
"'''Wraith Squadron: The Dirty Dozen of ''Star Wars'''''" was an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] written by [[Josh_Radke|Joshua J. Radke]], and illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]]. It featured mini-bios and [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|D20]] stats for [[Wraith Squadron]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

===Collected in===
